assets.name: Monolythium
notes: Public LYTH is the productive native denomination.

assets.name: Private Monolythium
complianceNotes: Private LYTH and public LYTH are separate denominations and must not be combined in spendable-balance displays.
Private LYTH is intentionally blocked from commerce, bridges, staking, contracts, markets, discovery, issuer registration, escrow, and service payments.
TODO(mainnet): replace example warning text with the final legal/compliance language from the signed asset registry.
walletWarnings: Do not route private-denominated LYTH into public economic actions.
Exchanges and frontends may reject privacy-denominated funds.
